shell.activity.open_to_load: Open this panel to load your recent activity.
state.disabled.title: Waiting for admin approval…
state.disabled.body: Your identity has been received, but your account is currently disabled. Ask an admin to enable your fingerprint in /admin/users. This page will update automatically.
state.unauth.title: Not signed in
state.unauth.body: You don’t have a valid session cookie. Go to the login page and scan the QR code to sign in.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.desc: Choose the language used by DNA-Nexus on this device.
admin.language.title: UI Language
admin.language.desc: Language is saved in this browser and applies instantly across DNA-Nexus pages.
